tool_args.label: Update on Extending Transit's Reach Strategic Action Plan - Dec 2023

payload.title: Update on Extending Transit's Reach Strategic Action Plan

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
NYC Department of Transportation (NYCDOT)

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYCDOT installed a cluster of bike racks at Metro-North Fordham Station

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
Long Island Rail Road (LIRR)
Q44 SBS
S79 SBS
M60 SBS
Bx23
Bike racks installed at subway station entrances

payload.description: Bike racks installed at 34 subway station entrances since January 2023; 99% of subway stations have bicycle racks within 100 feet of a station entrance; by Q2 2024 all 472 subway stations will have bicycle racks

tool_args.label: Bike racks at commuter rail stations

payload.description: NYCDOT installed bike rack cluster at Metro-North Fordham Station; 85% of commuter rail stations to have new or additional bike racks by 2024 (6 LIRR stations, 1 LIRR employee facility, 13 Metro-North stations); releasing RFP for on-demand app-enabled secure bike parking pilot at 4-6 commuter rail stations

tool_args.label: Front-of-bus bike racks on SBS and local routes

payload.description: MTA installed front-of-bus bike racks on 3 key Select Bus Service routes (Q44 SBS, S79 SBS, M60 SBS) and 4 local bus routes (S53, S93, Q50, Bx23) providing critical bike access connections across MTA bridges

tool_args.label: Henry Hudson Bridge walkway widening and accessible ramps

payload.treatment_kind: walkway widening and accessible ramp construction
payload.description: Widen lower walkway and construct accessible ramps on both sides of Henry Hudson Bridge

tool_args.label: Robert F. Kennedy Bridge interborough connectivity projects

payload.description: Three projects improving interborough connectivity to Randall's Island at Robert F. Kennedy Bridge: Manhattan Side Connection (Completed), Randall's to Manhattan and Bronx (Ongoing, projected completion 2024), Randall's to Queens (Award Imminent, projected completion 2028)

tool_args.label: Cross Bay Bridge new accessible ramp

payload.description: New accessible ramp at Cross Bay Bridge

tool_args.label: 99% of subway stations have bicycle racks within 100 feet

payload.raw_value_text: 99% of subway stations have bicycle racks within 100 feet of a station entrance

tool_args.label: 34 subway station entrances received bike racks since Jan 2023

payload.raw_value_text: bike racks were installed at 34 subway station entrances

tool_args.label: All 472 subway stations will have bicycle racks by Q2 2024

payload.raw_value_text: By Q2 2024, all 472 subway stations will have bicycle racks

tool_args.label: 85% of commuter rail stations with new/additional bike racks by 2024

payload.raw_value_text: 85% of commuter rail stations will have new or additional bike racks installed by 2024 (6 LIRR stations, 1 LIRR employee facility, and 13 Metro-North stations)

tool_args.label: Personal Electric Vehicle policy on buses

payload.claim_text: Personal electric vehicles on buses: No charging. Turn it off and keep it off. Fold it. Don't block seats, doors, or emergency equipment. Personal electric vehicles are not allowed on MTA Express Buses. Policy does NOT apply to ADA mobility devices. Always give priority to people with disabilities.
payload.subject: MTA Personal Electric Vehicle policy

tool_args.label: Extending Transit's Reach Strategic Action Plan published Jan 2023

payload.claim_text: In January 2023, MTA published a Strategic Action Plan to improve bicycle, pedestrian, and micromobility access across the entire MTA system through: Improved bike parking at subway and commuter rail stations, Enhanced bike infrastructure on buses, Safer routes to transit and bridges, Better biking and pedestrian lanes on bridges.
payload.subject: Extending Transit's Reach Strategic Action Plan

tool_args.label: Congestion pricing preparation

payload.claim_text: This year's progress coincides with MTA efforts to prepare the transit network for congestion pricing.
payload.subject: congestion pricing
